scenarios.decision: Scenario skipped — F-phase opt-in env var (TRELLIS_EVAL_SKILL_LOOP) not set. CI does not set it; the scenario is discoverable but inert until operators explicitly enable it.

findings.message: set TRELLIS_EVAL_SKILL_LOOP=1 to run skill_loop_convergence (reference-driver build; see scenario.py module docstring).

scenarios.name: skill_loop_convergence
